summary: Deliverable is incomplete. Task requires bats test infrastructure, test fixtures, and act-result.txt artifact—none are provided or executed by workflow. Script: proper bash conventions (set -euo pipefail, quoting, error handling), but Python3 dependency implicit. Workflow: pinned actions (v4), least-privilege (contents:read), scheduled trigger good. Critical gaps: (1) workflow doesn't run bats tests or set up test fixtures as required; (2) workflow always exits 0 despite license violations (set +e, exit 0), preventing CI failure; (3) no test execution harness through act; (4) no act-result.txt output. Script quality is adequate (parse_manifest, lookup_license, classify functions clear) but lacks test coverage, CSV format undocumented. Maintainer would reject: incomplete requirements, untestable code, no test harness.
